## 3dslibris 2.7.2

Library sorting improvements. You can now sort your library by six different criteria.

### New Features

* #93, #132: library sort now supports six modes: **by title**, **by filename**, **by author**, **by file type**, **by date modified**, and **by recently opened**. Cycle through them from the library settings button. The last-opened timestamp is saved per book so the recently opened order survives restarts.

### Bug Fixes

* #130: fixed a regression introduced in 2.7.0 where cover images in EPUB books appeared smaller than full screen. CSS margin processing on container elements was offsetting the image start position enough to prevent page-fill mode from triggering.

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip` (runtime files only; pair it with the `.3dsx` asset for Homebrew Launcher installs)
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
